scope_summary.problem: score issues CLI has list/show/sync (read path) but no write verbs (create/update/close) or search. → requirements.md § R1-R4
scope_summary.success: All IssueBackend CRUD verbs uniform across Local + GitHub + GitLab. Cross-artifact references (related:/implements:) in frontmatter. Agent-first --json + structured errors. → requirements.md § R5-R8
scope_summary.boundary: In scope: R1-R8 as specified. Out: Jira backend, bidirectional sync, authoring agent prompt.
